items.name: Green Chile Cheeseburger
items.description: Half-pound Angus patty with roasted Hatch green chile and pepper jack

items.name: Carne Adovada Plate
items.description: Slow-cooked pork in red chile, served with beans, rice, and fresh tortillas

items.name: Sopapillas
items.description: Freshly fried, served with honey. A New Mexico classic.

items.name: Enchiladas (Red, Green, or Christmas)
items.description: Three rolled enchiladas with your choice of chicken, beef, or cheese. Topped with onion and sour cream.

items.name: Chile Relleno Plate
items.description: Two battered and fried green chiles stuffed with cheese, smothered in red or green sauce

items.name: Tamale Dinner
items.description: Three handmade tamales with red chile sauce, beans, and rice

items.name: Huevos Rancheros
items.description: Two eggs over easy on corn tortillas, smothered in green chile with beans and hash browns

items.name: Guacamole & Chips
items.description: Fresh-made guacamole with warm tortilla chips

items.name: Green Chile Stew (Cup)
items.description: Hearty stew with pork, potatoes, and roasted green chile
